name: embed_create
description: Generate vector embeddings for text or image inputs, useful for semantic search, clustering, classification, and RAG pipelines.

parameters.name: input_type
parameters.description: Type of input: search_document, search_query, classification, clustering, or image.

parameters.name: texts
parameters.description: Array of text strings to embed (max 96 per call).

parameters.name: images
parameters.description: Array of data URI images to embed (max 1 per call, 5MB max).

parameters.name: embedding_types
parameters.description: Types requested: float, int8, uint8, binary, ubinary, base64.

parameters.name: truncate
parameters.description: Truncation mode: NONE, START, or END (default END).
